final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for OPPO Find X9 Ultra, a flagship smartphone full-screen brand advertisement for web/social media release.

Style/medium: photorealistic product marketing poster, high-contrast editorial style in the spirit of premium smartphone launch campaigns (Apple/Samsung keynote aesthetic)
Composition: full-bleed vertical layout, centered hero product shot, phone occupying 60–70% of frame height, bold headline text anchored at top or bottom third
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone, ultra-thin bezels, large circular camera module on rear, glossy premium finish, screen displaying vivid brand visuals
Scene/backdrop: deep black or dark gradient void background, subtle light bloom behind device to create depth
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio rim lighting from upper-left, cool blue-white specular highlights on device edges, high-contrast and aspirational
Color palette: deep black as dominant base, OPPO brand green/teal as accent, bright white for text and highlights — contrast-first hierarchy
Materials/textures: glass back with mirror-like reflections, polished metal frame with sharp edge catchlights, subtle lens glass refraction
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Ultra"
Constraints: must read as a full-screen 1080×1920 mobile web banner; brand name must be legible at full scale; layout must work as a brand-exposure hero visual
Avoid: cluttered background, lens flare overload, generic tech blue gradient, watermark, floating random UI elements, blurry device edges
